case_title: DISCOVER CARD 2U29 VS. GREGORY A. ROUGEAU et al

docket_entries.description: GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ROUGEAU, GREGORY A.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-13-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-13-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON AUG-13-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR ON DEC-13-2010 IN DEPT. 206. SOPHIA ANDRITSAKIS SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. GREGORY ROUGEAU APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER REPRESENTATION FROM PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
